entry.title: A silent song
entry.summary:
Author: Blop_blip13

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,930Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Hiiii i made a fic again :P Reader moves into a new town to find some peace. But for how long that peace can stay is not known. Meeting a few people causes that peace to end really quick   Yandere batfam x deaf reader So yall know i self am not deaf but i will try my best to write everything as accurately as posible

entry.title: A Nice Little Weekend Get-Away
entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,052Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 49

Summary: Disclaimer: BDSM I think is good for trauma healing with trusted partners, so keep that in mind. :) come at this with an open mind and heart and a change of panties anyways- you’re about to get railed by two beefcakes bc you want to. entry.title: Quiet Affections
entry.summary:
Author: RedSakura101

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,463Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 18

Summary: My little series where Jason uses flowers to express his love, in subtle and sweet ways. Going through the developing stages of your romance. He's never found it very easy to express how he feels, he finds comfort in using quiet gestures of little ways to convey just how much he cares for you. Even if you don't realise the full extent of them. Eventually you catch onto his silent messages, and find a beautiful to preserve them. (this has been crossposted to my Tumblr @redsakura101)

entry.title: New Year's Day
entry.summary:
Author: midnights_blues

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: New Year's Eve, 2014. Titan's Tower. You don't want to be there. Jason Todd doesn't want to be there. Until he catches a glimpse of a certain Wonder Girl (you). Too bad you're both prideful, stubborn, and bad at feelings. At least there's an open bar?

entry.title: Simply Am
entry.summary:
Author: chlo_caineandabel

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,074Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 7

Summary: What happens when a lonely girl and boys who's alone meet? They bond. Not because they only have each other, but because they don't understand one another. You were siting alone in the park with seventeen minutes left till midnight. Seventeen minutes left of your birthday. A slightly stale cupcake you received from the bakery that closed ten minutes ago sits beside you on the bench. The moon rolls about in the sky as it slowly takes its place in the dark canvas of the sky. Out of the silence of the night, you hear someone's voice. "What brings you out here so late at night?"

entry.title: Velvet Crowbar
entry.summary:
Author: VenusCrytrap

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,875Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 841

Summary: The kid next door has it rough. There’s nothing much anyone can do about it in a place like the Narrows, but you lead with as much kindness as you can afford and try to make his life a little easier. He crushes on you the way a lot of kids do on their babysitter, but he’s too young and too scrawny. He fears you’ll never take him seriously. Life tears you apart, but when the universe puts you in his path years later, Jason thinks he may finally have a shot- even though you’re both a little different. And a little worse. (Or: Jason reunites with the babysitter he had a big fat crush on)

entry.title: A (safe) House (not) in Nebraska
entry.summary:
Author: champagnesbiggestproblem

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,077Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 20

Summary: After a particularly bad night on patrol, he needs to get out of Gotham. So, he drives and drives and drives, until he reaches the only safe house Bruce never knew about. The house Jason hadn’t returned to since you left. Now he’s stuck cleaning up all the memories you both left behind.

entry.title: promise me this
entry.summary:
Author: emerald_lotus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,056Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 74

Summary: Jason has succumbed to the classic trap: falling in love with his best friend. After a childhood on the streets of Gotham together and an incredibly fucked up life, he only falls deeper and harder until it's time to finally do something. But life keeps getting in the way and he has to decide what he’s willing to give up to be with her.
